title: Infosys Launches Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the launch of the Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce on October 10, 2025. The suite builds on Infosys’s collaboration with Salesforce and uses Infosys Topaz together with Salesforce’s agentic AI capabilities to deliver Agentforce solutions. The offering is intended to help enterprises scale digital workforces, improve customer experience, automate customer interactions, and drive efficiencies across sales, service, and marketing channels. The release cites client implementations involving a leading research institute, a media house, and VTT, including Agentforce SDR deployment and customer service transformation, but does not disclose financial terms, revenue contribution, or quantified contract values.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced a comprehensive suite of solutions called the Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce.
key_facts.section_heading: Launching Today: Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce

key_facts.fact: The solutions build on Infosys’s longstanding collaboration with Salesforce and are designed to deliver advanced Agentforce solutions for enterprise digital transformation initiatives.
key_facts.section_heading: Launching Today: Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce

key_facts.fact: The suite leverages Infosys Topaz and Salesforce's agentic AI capabilities to automate processes such as service inquiries, sales tasks, and employee support.
key_facts.section_heading: Launching Today: Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce

key_facts.fact: Infosys stated that the solutions aim to drive measurable efficiencies across sales, services, and marketing channels.
key_facts.section_heading: Launching Today: Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce

key_facts.fact: Infosys deployed Agentforce SDR for a leading research institute to address sales process inefficiencies and reduce response time.
key_facts.section_heading: Launching Today: Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce

key_facts.fact: Infosys helped a renowned media house transform customer service operations using Salesforce's agentic AI solutions and service management techniques.
key_facts.section_heading: Launching Today: Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce

key_facts.fact: Fluido, an Infosys company, helped VTT reimagine customer experience and implement a live SDR Agentforce agent.
key_facts.section_heading: Launching Today: Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, today announced a comprehensive suite of solutions - the Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Launching Today: Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce

important_text_spans.text: The solutions are designed to accelerate agentic transformation, empowering businesses to effectively scale their digital workforce, enhance customer experiences, and achieve tangible business results.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Launching Today: Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce
important_text_spans.reason: Explains the strategic purpose and intended business impact of the suite.

important_text_spans.text: Leveraging  Infosys  Topaz,  an  AI-first  set  of  services,  solutions  and  platforms,  along  with  Salesforce's agentic AI capabilities, these Agentforce solutions enable enterprises to streamline customer interactions by automating processes such as service inquiries, sales tasks, and employee support.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Launching Today: Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the technologies used and core use cases.

important_text_spans.text: The solutions have already delivered measurable outcomes for clients.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Launching Today: Infosys Customer Experience Suite for Salesforce
important_text_spans.reason: Supports that the offering has been used in client contexts, though without quantified financial metrics.
